ASC_REPORTER_ACCESS_TOKEN.regeneration_steps: App Store Connect → Sales and Trends Reports → About Reports → Generate Reporter Token → Regenerate

BOT_DISPATCH_PAT.regeneration_steps: GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens (fine-grained) → Regenerate

RUSTORE_PRIVATE_KEY.regeneration_steps: RuStore Console → Сервисные ключи → Создать новый ключ → загрузить .pem
